channel.title: mint - markets
channel.description: Get the latest news and analysis on business, finance, politics from mint, the website of the Mint newspaper, one of India's leading business and financial dailies

item.title: Nifty 50 Trading Strategy: Analysts recommend Bull Call Spread options strategy for 7 July expiry
item.description: Nifty 50 Trading Strategy: Axis Securities has recommended a Bull Call Spread strategy for Nifty options contracts expiring on 7 July 2026, expecting a moderately bullish view.

item.title: FMCG sector set for strong Q1, lower crude oil prices to boost margins, says Anand Rathi; Marico, HUL among top picks
item.description: The FMCG sector is expected to see healthy revenue growth in FY27, fueled by innovation and price adjustments. Anand Rathi highlights top picks like Marico and Hindustan Unilever, despite rural demand risks associated with weather conditions impacting the market.

item.title: After May rout, banks see RBI's FCNR move as a tailwind
item.description: After being the most heavily sold sector by foreign investors in May, banking stocks have likely found a fresh tailwind. Analysts say the RBI's latest foreign currency deposit scheme could lower funding costs and improve the sector's long-term investment appeal.

item.title: NSE SME stock hits record high despite muted trends in the Indian stock market. Do you own?
item.description: RFBL Flexi Pack Limited's shares rose 3% on June 30 after securing a ₹20 crore order for transparent and metallized films. The broader equity market remained subdued due to concerns over US interest rates, with Nifty and Sensex posting minor declines.

item.title: Bajaj Auto share buyback to open on July 1: Should you participate in the ₹5,633 crore offer?
item.description: Bajaj Auto share price surged as much as 1.06% to ₹9,732 apiece on NSE on Tuesday, ahead of buyback opening.

item.title: SBI, HDFC Bank to ICICI Bank: Nuvama recommends these 12 banking stocks to buy today for long term
item.description: Nuvama Institutional Equities highlights 12 banking stocks, including SBI, HDFC Bank, and ICICI Bank, as top picks for long-term investment, emphasizing their potential upside amidst macroeconomic challenges.&nbsp;

item.title: Vinit Mobile IPO opens today; GMP, subscription status, price band, other key details of SME IPO
item.description: Vinit Mobile IPO price band is set at ₹150 to ₹158 per share, and the IPO lot size is 800 shares. The company aims to raise ₹34.13 crore from the book-building issue, which is entirely a fresh issue of 21.60 lakh equity shares.

item.title: Teja Engineering Industries IPO opens today. GMP, subscription status, other details of NSE SME IPO in 10 points
item.description: Teja Engineering Industries IPO: According to market observers, shares of the company are available at par in the grey market today

item.title: Healthcare stock Park Medi World hits record high despite weak trends on Dalal Street
item.description: Healthcare stock Park Medi World surged as much as 4.45% to 303.70 apiece in Monday's trading session despite weak market sentiments on Dalal Street.

item.title: Multibagger renewable energy stock Suzlon Energy share price gains on 105 MW order win; do you own?
item.description: Following the launch of the S175 wind turbine, Sunsure Energy has placed a 105 MW order with Suzlon, showcasing strong market confidence. The collaboration supports growth in renewable energy and aims to meet India's industrial energy needs.

item.title: Nifty IT plunges over 2%; Infosys, LTIMindtree, TCS among top laggards
item.description: On June 30, the Nifty IT index dropped over 2% due to global tech weaknesses and demand concerns. Key players like LTIMindtree, Infosys, and TCS led the decline, with analysts highlighting a crucial support level that could define the index's trajectory.

item.title: Japanese yen slides to 40-year low against the US dollar
item.description: The Japanese currency is on track to decline 2% in the second quarter, marking its fourth consecutive quarterly loss. This is its longest losing streak since 2022, when it fell for seven straight quarters, according to Reuters.

item.title: Advit Jewels IPO GMP signals strong listing on July 1; check allotment status, subscription and other details
item.description: The Advit Jewels IPO received significant investor interest, being oversubscribed 212.63 times. The issue's price band is set at ₹130-138 per share. The company will debut on stock exchanges on July 1, with a grey market premium indicating a possible listing price of ₹184 per share.

item.title: Oyo IPO: Parent Prism files updated DRHP for ₹6,650 crore public issue
item.description: According to the Updated Draft Red Herring Prospectus (UDRHP) filed on Tuesday, the IPO will consist of a fresh issue of equity shares worth up to ₹6,650 crore, marking the company's latest bid to enter the public markets.

item.title: Knack Packaging IPO opens tomorrow. GMP, date, size to review in 10 points
item.description: Knack Packaging IPO GMP today: According to market observers, shares of the company are available at a premium of ₹5 in the grey market today

item.title: Bitcoin price falls below $60,000 again: Experts reveal key levels to watch for the cryptocurrency - What lies ahead?
item.description: Bitcoin struggles near $58,000 as bearish sentiment prevails. The market looks towards US economic reports and expected interest rate hikes, causing subdued trading and cautious investor behavior across digital assets.

item.title: Aastha Spintex IPO Day 2: Issue booked 1.10x so far. Check GMP, subscription, review. Apply or skip?
item.description: The Aastha Spintex IPO is priced between ₹125-136 and opens for subscription until 1 July. It has allocated 20% for QIBs, 40% for NIIs, and 40% for retail investors, with allotments expected on 2 July and listing on 6 July.

item.title: Gold rate drops near ₹1,40,500 per 10 grams on MCX; silver declines below ₹2,21,000 per kg; what should investors do?
item.description: MCX gold August futures were 1.28% down at ₹1,40,574 per 10 grams, while MCX silver September contracts were 1.04% down at ₹2,20,322 per kg around 9:10 am.

item.title: Rupee opens marginally weaker at 94.57 against US dollar
item.description: The Indian rupee opened weaker at 94.57 against the US dollar, hindered by high demand for dollars despite a recovery from its record low. The rupee remains range-bound as global tensions and foreign investor caution affect the currency and market sentiment.

item.title: SIS announces ₹120 crore share buyback, fifth since listing; check details
item.description: SIS Ltd has proposed a ₹120 crore share buyback, its fifth since 2017. The maximum buyback price is set at ₹478.50 per share. This follows an 8% stock rise in a month and highlights the company's commitment to returning around ₹720 crore to shareholders through various initiatives.

item.title: Stocks to buy for short term: Trent, Torrent Pharma among 6 stocks experts recommend for next 1-2 weeks
item.description: Stocks to buy for the short term: Experts highlight six stocks poised for short-term gains. From Trent, Lloyds Metals to Torrent Pharma, these companies showcase strong momentum backed by technical indicators.&nbsp;

item.title: CSM Technologies IPO allotment date likely today. GMP, steps to check share allotment status online
item.description: CSM Technologies IPO allotment status is expected to be finalised today, 30 June 2026. CSM Technologies IPO allotment status online check can be done through the websites of BSE and NSE, and also on the official portal of the IPO registrar. Kfin Technologies is the CSM Technologies IPO registrar.

item.title: Stock market today: Gift Nifty hints muted start; US-Iran talks to global markets - 7 stocks to buy or sell
item.description: Indian stock market indices, Sensex and Nifty 50, are expected to open positively on Tuesday amid rising global markets, despite geopolitical tensions due to US-Iran conflicts and profit booking. Experts suggest cautious trading influenced by upcoming negotiations and regional developments.

item.title: Buy or sell: Gift Nifty up, Vaishali Parekh recommends three stocks to buy today — 30 June 2026
item.description: Buy or sell: Vaishali Parekh recommends three stocks to buy today — MCX, IEX, and JSW Energy

item.title: Stocks to watch: HDFC Bank, Bajaj Auto, Yes Bank among shares in focus today; check list here
item.description: Stock market today: On Monday, the Sensex declined 372.10 points, or 0.48%, to settle at 76,728.37, while the Nifty 50 dropped 109.75 points, or 0.46%, ending the session at 23,946.25.

item.title: Nifty 50, Sensex prediction today: Check how Indian stock market is expected to trade on 30 June
item.description: Nifty 50, Sensex prediction today: The trends on Gift Nifty also indicate a mildly positive start for the Indian benchmark index. The Gift Nifty was trading around 23,994 level, a premium of nearly 21 points from the Nifty futures’ previous close.

item.title: Crude oil prices fall on possible US-Iran talks; Brent near $72 per barrel
item.description: US-Iran war: Brent crude futures for August delivery, set to expire on Tuesday, fell 1.03%, or 75 cents, to $72.40 per barrel.

item.title: From Gift Nifty, Nasdaq, Nikkei rally to gold rate: 10 key things that changed for Indian stock market overnight
item.description: Gift Nifty was trading around 24,011 level, a premium of nearly 38 points from the Nifty futures’ previous close, indicating a mildly positive start for the Indian stock market indices.

item.title: Asian stocks today: Kospi, Nikkei trade mixed amid US-Iran peace talks
item.description: Asian stocks today: Japan's Nikkei 225 remained volatile and traded largely flat and the Topix was down 0.65%.

item.title: Breakout stocks to buy or sell: Sumeet Bagadia recommends five shares to buy today - 30 June 2026
item.description: The Indian stock market ended Monday's session on a lower note. Sumeet Bagadia of Choice Broking recommends five breakout stocks to buy today.

item.title: Stock recommendations for 30 June from MarketSmith India
item.description: MarketSmith India reveals its top stock recommendations for today, 30 June. Get expert insights into the best-performing stocks to guide your investment decisions.

item.title: Three sectors investors should watch now
item.description: What are the sectors that investors should be tracking?&nbsp;

item.title: Raja Venkatraman recommends three stocks for 30 June
item.description: Market expert Raja Venkatraman shares his top stock picks for 30 June. Here’s his technical outlook and trade strategy.

item.title: Sebi panel weighs proposal to open physically settled commodity trades to FPIs
item.description: The proposal seeks to address a long-standing tax hurdle that has kept FPIs out of bullion and base metal derivatives, where contracts are compulsorily deliverable on expiry.

item.title: How retail came to life in currency derivatives during war
item.description: As local unit plunges 6.5% participation as percentage of turnover almost doubles; brokers say such trades are hedges against currency volatility&nbsp;
